series_metadata.series_description: Contains all documents regarding investigation of case/complaint.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Adjudicated cases: Retain in office area for a period of three years. If complaints are non-chargeable or unfounded, then destroy. For chargeable complaints, retain in office until a hearing is conducted and all appeals have been exhausted, or case is settled, then destroy after three years. ; Electronic: Adjudicated cases: Retain in office area for a period of three years. If complaints are non-chargeable or unfounded, then destroy. For chargeable complaints, retain in office until a hearing is conducted and all appeals have been exhausted, or case is settled, then destroy after three years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
